# gcal-daily-planner


Generate a daily planning Markdown file combining Google Calendar events and Jira tasks.



## Triggers

- generate daily planning

- create daily agenda from calendar and tasks

- plan their day automatically




## What I do

- Fetch today's Google Calendar events and Jira tasks in progress

- Schedule tasks around existing events using configurable work windows and buffers

- Generate a daily markdown agenda at 00-Calendar/Events/YYYY/YYYY-MM-DD.md




## Usage examples

- Use the gcal-daily-planner skill

- Generate my daily plan

- Create my daily agenda
